title: Simon Property Group: The 29.05% YTD Decline Has Pushed Its Yield To 5.98%
text: Shares of SPG have declined more than their respective peer group, SPY and VNQ, indicating that they may be oversold. SPG trades at a 9.69x Price to FFO which is the lowest in its peer group which supports the idea shares are trading at oversold levels.

title: 7 Dividend Stocks to Buy for June With Yields Over 6%
text: As the stock market plunges toward bear market territory, investors increasingly look for dividend stocks to buy. These are the best dividend stocks to buy now.

title: Down 30%, Is This Mall REIT Still a Buy?
text: Demand for malls is dwindling, but that doesn't mean the future of Simon Property Group is dwindling, too.

title: Simon Property Group: One Of The Highest Quality REITs Around
text: Year-to-date shares of SPG are down roughly 30% providing a great entry point for investors. SPG owns the highest quality portfolio of malls on the market today.

title: Simon Property: Getting Interesting Near $100
text: Simon's business trends continue to improve, which should support the share quote, sooner or later. The stock's valuation vs. the overall U.S. equity market and other retail-focused REITs is quite compelling near $100 in price.

title: Simon Property: Buy Signal From 4% Yield Spread
text: Simon Property's valuation is currently at a 50%+ discount from its historical average in terms of dividend yield. The yield spread against the risk-free rate is 4%, the highest level in a decade when the 2020 market crash is excluded.

title: 7 ‘Strong Buy' REITs With Massive Dividends Are Incredible Bargains Now
text: In every major sell-off, the proverbial baby is almost always thrown out with the bathwater, because terrified investors think that everything is going to zero and will stay there.

title: 3 Blue-Chip REITs That Are Hard To Beat
text: The true test of quality comes when the going gets rough. That's when excellent property management, superior asset location, admirable leasing skills, and strong access to capital make an obvious difference.

title: Simon Property (SPG) Q1 FFO Tops, '22 View Up, Dividend Hiked
text: Simon Property's (SPG) Q1 results reflect a better-than-expected top line. With an improving operating environment, this retail REIT also raises its 2022 FFO per share outlook and dividend.

title: Simon Property Group's (SPG) CEO David Simon on Q1 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Simon Property Group, Inc. title: Parnassus Comments on Simon Property Group
text: Mall and shopping center company Simon Property Group ( SPG , Financial) subtracted -0.41% from the Fund's return, as its stock slipped -16.6%. Operating profitability, leasing activity and occupancy rates all improved through the year.

title: Is This Mall REIT Overdoing a Good Thing?

title: Simon and Brookfield Pursue Kohl's to Join Rival J.C. Penney
text: Kohl's on Friday mailed a letter to shareholders, written by incoming Kohl's board chair Peter Boneparth urging the shareholders to vote for all 13 of Kohl's current director nominees, ahead of Kohl's May 11, shareholders meeting.
